_comment: Logical level per event type — how much YOU care (1=Headline … 4=Background). Distinct from derivation level (structural). 'lift' lets an event ALSO appear in higher (more important) lanes up to the given ceiling — e.g. an L2 event lifted to 1 shows in both L1 and L2. Exploration seed only; later this becomes user-set and stored in the DB. The aware dashboard reads this file at build time.
